name: Juniper NetScreen session log

Apr 28 04:02:04 fw02: NetScreen device_id=ssg140 [Root]system-warning-00518(traffic): start_time="2024-04-28 04:02:03" duration=1 policy_id=1 service=icmp proto=1 src zone=Untrust dst zone=Trust action=Deny sent=0 rcvd=0 src=1.2.3.4 dst=10.0.0.5 session_id=0 reason=Policy denied
description: Adapted from logstash-plugins/logstash-patterns-core patterns/ecs-v1/firewalls (Apache-2.0), entry NETSCREENSESSIONLOG. Inlined SYSLOGTIMESTAMP, NSDEVID, HOSTNAME, NS_DEVID, NS_DURATION, NS_POLICY_ID, NS_PROTO, NS_SERVICE, NS_ACTION, IPORHOST macros to plain PCRE2.
